subcodes.title: Words to H.E.H et al, spoken on 1913-11-05
subcodes.first_line: The other day we touched upon the subject concerning the object of the appearance of the Prophets. For what purpose did God send Moses?
subcodes.subjects: @Moses, @Manifestation of God as educator, @spiritual transformation, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @power of the Manifestation of God, @limits of the intellect
